articles.title: Musk Takes the Stand: The Battle Over OpenAI's Soul
articles.summary: Elon Musk testified that Sam Altman betrayed OpenAI's nonprofit mission, calling it a 'steal the charity' scheme. The trial could derail OpenAI's $852 billion valuation and its IPO plans. Musk invested $38 million early on but lost faith in Altman by 2022.

articles.title: Supreme Court Signals Green Light for Ending Protections for Over a Million Immigrants
articles.summary: The Supreme Court's conservative majority appeared poised to let the Trump administration end Temporary Protected Status (TPS), potentially deporting over a million people from Haiti, Syria, and other nations. Justices clashed over whether courts can review the decision, with accusations of racial bias surfacing.

articles.title: Carney's First Year: How Canada's PM Turned Trump's Threats Into a Foreign Policy Reset
articles.summary: Facing tariffs and '51st state' taunts from Trump, Canadian PM Mark Carney has diversified trade partners and boosted his approval to 58%. Experts praise his 'strong and resolute' stance, but critics warn fast-tracked projects may sideline Indigenous communities.
